description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbing around neckline and distressed look graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in warm water with like colors Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry on low Do not iron on print Do not dry clean Get ready to indulge the wild rock and roll side of yuou with this black free authority tee from bioworld. The graphic featuring an aerosmith record gives this tee the same sense of rebellion and madness of the rock band. Pair it with sneakers and light denims for that stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
